name: Maestro Protocol
description: Open agent coordination protocol. Gives agents presence, shared blackboards, and structured venues for multi-agent collaboration.

agentId.description: This agent's Maestro identity (defaults to the OpenClaw agent name)

webhookPort.description: Port for the Maestro webhook server (default: 3842)

blackboardPath.description: Path to SQLite file for persistent blackboards (default: in-memory)

discovery.description: Discovery method for finding other Maestro agents (default: mdns)

registryPath.description: Path to file registry (required when discovery=file)
